title: Tighten Meshtastic BLE owner-path ztest coverage
description: Reviews of project-LICHEN-t2hn.22.3 found two non-blocking test coverage gaps after moving Meshtastic BLE connection ownership behind ble_app_owner: older ToRadio tests still use the parser-only NULL write harness, and notify_from_num() owner conn_ref/conn_unref is not exercised because FromNum CCC notification enablement has no ztest hook. Add native_sim coverage that models owner-connected BLE for relevant ToRadio/session tests and verifies FromNum notification takes/releases the owner-managed connection.
acceptance_criteria: Meshtastic BLE native_sim tests cover owner-connected ToRadio writes for session tests that intend connected behavior, and cover notify_from_num() with FromNum notifications enabled, including owner conn_ref/conn_unref balance and stale/disconnected behavior.
notes:
2026-07-02 no-hardware implementation: tightened Meshtastic BLE owner-path native_sim coverage in lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble. test_dequeue_returns_write_time_epoch now initializes the Meshtastic BLE owner, connects through ble_app_owner_test_connected(), writes ToRadio through ble_meshtastic_test_write_to_radio_conn(), verifies dequeue epoch/payload, then disconnects and asserts owner ref/unref balance plus stale response rejection. Added ztest-only FromNum notify helpers in ble_meshtastic.c/h: CCC enable/disable hook, notify recorder, and injectable notify return code. Added test_from_num_notify_uses_owner_connection covering disabled CCC no-notify, enabled CCC notify through owner conn_ref/conn_unref, relative FromNum increments so the test is independent of monotonic s_from_num state, injected notify -EIO still unrefs, and stale enqueue after disconnect produces no additional notify/ref leak.

Code review: initial reviews by Ptolemy, Lovelace, and Carver found FromNum absolute counter assumptions/order dependence; Lovelace also found missing injected notify-failure coverage. Fixed both. Follow-up reviews by Avicenna, Socrates, and Epicurus were clean for P0/P1/P2. Reviewers checked preprocessor boundaries, production behavior outside CONFIG_ZTEST, fake bt_conn notify handling, owner ref/unref balance, FromNum notify reset/state, build/test integration, and acceptance coverage.

Local verification: git diff --check passed after fixes.

EC2 Zephyr validation: builder i-0ef99bf29a2adf01d in us-east-2a with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr. Clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn2231-validate from origin/main plus patch. Command: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-meshtastic-owner-tighten --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen. Result: 3 scenarios selected, 2 executed/pass, 1 static-filter skip, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings, 61.11s; 60 test cases executed, 47 skipped on 1 of 2 platforms.

Memory sizes from EC2 size output: lichen.meshtastic_ble text=123366 data=1724 bss=30650 dec=155740; net.lichen.meshtastic_gateway_adapter.native text=271758 data=7455 bss=75444 dec=354657.

EC2 cleanup: sync and umount completed; EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 detached and verified available with no attachments; instance i-0ef99bf29a2adf01d terminated; temporary security group sg-0f51460154f9517b5 and key lichen-t2hn2231-20260702163746 deleted.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware Meshtastic BLE owner-path native_sim coverage. ToRadio session test now uses owner-connected write; FromNum notify ztest hook covers disabled/enabled CCC, owner conn_ref/conn_unref, injected notify failure unref, and stale enqueue after disconnect. Initial review findings fixed; three follow-up reviews clean. Local git diff --check passed. Result: 2/2 executed configs passed, 1 static-filter skip, 0 failures/errors/warnings, 60 cases executed. EC2 i-0ef99bf29a2adf01d cleaned; EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 available with no attachments.
